global_description: A slender, medium-sized seabird with a long neck and thin body. It has glossy black plumage with iridescent green and purple hues, a long, thin bill, and a distinctive red face patch. The wings are narrow and pointed, and the tail is long and wedge-shaped.

part_details.plumage: Glossy black with iridescent green and purple tones, smooth texture.
part_details.bill: Long, thin, slightly hooked at the tip, dark gray.
part_details.face: Red patch around the eyes, contrasting with dark feathers.
part_details.wings: Narrow, pointed, black with a glossy sheen.
part_details.tail: Long, wedge-shaped, black with a glossy finish.

spatial_relations: The long thin bill extends from the front of the head.
The red face patch surrounds the eyes.
The narrow wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The long tail extends from the rear of the body.
